name: io.github.0rkz/byte-protocol
description: Per-byte USDC data feeds and oracles for AI agents on Arbitrum. Subscribe to first-party feeds (weather, markets, threat-intel, earthquakes) or buy single packets via x402. No API keys, no token, EIP-712-attested payloads.

environmentVariables.description: Ethereum private key for write operations (subscribe, unsubscribe, publish, buy_data). Not required for read-only tools.
environmentVariables.name: PRIVATE_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Arbitrum RPC URL. Defaults to Arbitrum Sepolia public RPC.
environmentVariables.name: RPC_URL
